title: Crisp Fish Bowl
description: A fresh and healthy bowl filled with crispy fish and topped with fresh herbs. Perfect for a quick and easy lunch.
instructions: Season the fish with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the fish to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the fish to a baking sheet and bake in the oven for 8-10 minutes.
While the fish is cooking, prepare the bowl by adding the crisp lettuce, sliced cucumber, and chopped parsley.
Once the fish is cooked, remove it from the oven and place it on top of the bowl.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the fish and serve immediately.
